notableEvents.label: Trevor Story reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Amed Rosario.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge singles on a line drive to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. José Caballero scores. Cody Bellinger to 3rd. Aaron Judge to 2nd. Aaron Judge advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Wilyer Abreu.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error

notableEvents.label: Trevor Story GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice. Wilyer Abreu out at 2nd. Trevor Story out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Amed Rosario.
